architecture.summary: Internal CLI fix within existing modules (increment-utils.ts, init.ts, specweave.js). TOCTOU race requires atomic next-id+create. No architectural changes.

integrations.summary: N/A - pure internal CLI tool, no external service integrations

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI tool, no UI involved

performance.summary: N/A - correctness fixes, not performance changes

security.summary: N/A - internal dev tool. Fixes prevent data corruption (duplicate IDs) but no external security implications

edge-cases.summary: The 6 bugs ARE the edge cases: sibling project interference, init timing window, backlog scanning gap, TOCTOU race, cross-tool SKILL.md, disabled guard
